title: Sabotage of unit 04
wikitext:
[]: Sabotage of unit 04?             Quote Post by MasterSe7en » Sun Apr 24, 2011 8:10 pm Wassup guys, im new to posting but ive been reading for quite a while, the question i had was the part a little after unit-04 exploded and took the US base with it, a little after u see Kaji in a room full of wires, looks like a server room and says "Was it really an accident?" what was that about? did he sabotage something to make unit-04 blow up or did seele or someone else? shed some light?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Apr 24, 2011 8:18 pm It obviously wasn't Kaji who made Eva-04 blow up, but sabotage is heavily implied.

[]:             Quote Post by katastroff » Sun Apr 24, 2011 8:27 pm The thought came to my mind that Gendo had designed the whole Bardiel thing, since everything about that event was "according to plan." By extension, it wouldn't be too far to believe that the blowing up of eva-04 was also done intentionally in some form by Gendo. Kaji doesn't know the whole details of Gendo's plan, its only shared with Fuyutsuki, which is why he's suspicious of the whole thing. Also, at this point, SEELE's plan and Gendo's plan are still mutual and don't conflict, since they both require Shinji lose faith and have Unit 01 "awaken".

[]:             Quote Post by MasterSe7en » Sun Apr 24, 2011 9:13 pm ok cool, i didnt think Kaji had anything to do with it but him being in a room with a ton of wires that looks like they were ripped out of place felt like it suggested something

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sun Apr 24, 2011 10:42 pm MasterSe7en wrote: ok cool, i didnt think Kaji had anything to do with it but him being in a room with a ton of wires that looks like they were ripped out of place felt like it suggested something

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Apr 24, 2011 11:02 pm katastroff wrote: The thought came to my mind that Gendo had designed the whole Bardiel thing, since everything about that event was "according to plan." By extension, it wouldn't be too far to believe that the blowing up of eva-04 was also done intentionally in some form by Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Hiten777 » Mon Apr 25, 2011 12:29 am Sabotage is very plausible but it's safe to say that the experimental S2 engine holds a little more ground. It's the first time using the S2 engine (mostly the one taken from Shamshel like in the series) and they don't what to expect when using an energy source that can go from 0-infinite. Also, I don't think Gendo put to much stock in Shinji coming back or to come back with such determination. I think after Shinji left he felt like he could get by with awakening Unit-01 himself since he thought the Dummy System allowed him to control it do a certain degree with the right stimilus.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Apr 25, 2011 3:27 am Hiten777 wrote: It's the first time using the S2 engine (mostly the one taken from Shamshel like in the series)
